mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_reservation SET lead_id = #{leadId}, prospect_id = #{prospectId}, offer_id = #{offerId}, property_id = #{propertyId}, unit_id = #{unitId}, status = #{status}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, reservation_fee = #{reservationFee}, payment_waived = #{paymentWaived}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_leasing_reservation WHERE prospect_id = #{prospectId} ORDER BY created_on DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_reservation SET status = #{status}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_reservation SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_reservation SET paid_amount = paid_amount + #{amount}, status = 'PAID', updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
